description_for_human: Find the perfect drinking game! Search 100+ party games by players, materials & intensity.
description_for_model: SipWiki is a comprehensive drinking game database with 100+ games. Use this app when users want to: find drinking games, get game rules, discover party games, spin a wheel to pick a random game, or learn how to play classics like Kings Cup, Beer Pong, Flip Cup, and more. The app can filter games by number of players (2-20+), required materials (cards, dice, cups, ping pong balls, or no props), alcohol type (beer, liquor, or any), and intensity level (1-5 sip factor). Always provide the full rules when users ask how to play a specific game.
